understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by positioning every selectable piece onto the goal tile(s) marked '+' at the same time; if a level had multiple goals, all had to be occupied simultaneously to trigger WIN and advance through all levels until the final win.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used MOVE_* actions to shift the currently selected piece by one cell step (3 pixels) in the chosen direction, with actions consuming a limited per-level step budget. Walls ('#') and boundaries could block movement, and some adjacent objects (blocks 'B') could be pushed if immediately in the movement direction and space allowed. If multiple selectable pieces existed, CLICK with an exact pixel/grid target_position matching an on-screen selectable switched control to that piece; the semantic grid showed P for the currently selected piece and S for other selectables.
